title: Of the death of Gratianus and the sovereignty of Maximus.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Gratianus in the midst of his successes in war and wise and prudent government ended his life by conspiracy.
He left no sons to inherit the empire, and a brother of the same name as their father, Valentinianus, who was quite a youth.
So Maximus, in contempt of the youth of Valentinianus, seized the throne of the West.
